project.title: cryo-EM study of bovine retinal pigment epithelium cell lysate
project.projectDescription: This is the proteomic analysis data of bovine retinal pigment epithelium cell lysate subjected to cryo-EM study.
project.sampleProcessingProtocol: Bovine retinal pigment epithelium cell was lysed and fractionated by size exclusion chromatography. Two protein fractions were collected and subjected to protein digestion followed by LC-MS/MS analysis.
project.dataProcessingProtocol: Proteins were identified by comparing all of the experimental peptide MS/MS spectra against the UniProt bovine proteome database using a database search engine, MaxQuant  (version 2.0.3.1). Carbamidomethylation of cysteine was set as a fixed modification, whereas variable modifications included oxidation of methionine to methionine sulfoxide and acetylation of N-terminal amino groups. For peptide/protein identification, strict trypsin specificity was applied, the minimum peptide length was set to 6, the maximum missed cleavage was set to 2, and the cutoff false discovery rate was set to 0.01.
